'''LE-VO law enforcement droids''' were tall, lumbering [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]], developed by the [[Rseikharhl]]s and were a major component of Rseikharhl's sector-wide [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement]]. Despite a decade of law-enforcement activities, LE-VOs were responsible for over 20,000 arrests with no [[Death/Legends|fatalities]]. This was due partly due to the [[Droid/Legends|droids]]' size and their demeanor, as they were programmed to always choose to [[Stun/Legends|stun]] targets rather than kill. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] allowed the Rseikharhls to continue using these droids due to the non-lethal programming.

Several of them served in [[12-4C-41's Droid Army]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].
